name: app-updates
title: App Updates
description: Check for available updates of your installed macOS apps via Sparkle, Homebrew Cask, and Mac App Store
author: Undolog

commands.name: check-updates
commands.title: Check Updates
commands.subtitle: App Updates
commands.description: Scan installed apps for available updates via Sparkle, Homebrew Cask, and Mac App Store

commands.name: menu-bar
commands.title: Updates Menu Bar
commands.subtitle: App Updates
commands.description: Show available app updates in the menu bar

commands.name: doctor-advice
commands.title: Doctor Advice
commands.subtitle: App Updates
commands.description: Get AI-powered explanations and fix suggestions for brew doctor warnings.

commands.name: brew-maintenance
commands.title: Brew Maintenance
commands.subtitle: App Updates
commands.description: Run daily Homebrew maintenance: update, upgrade, doctor, cleanup. Shows results in menu bar.

preferences.name: brewRunDoctor
preferences.label: brew doctor
preferences.description: Check for potential issues with your Homebrew installation

preferences.name: brewRunCleanup
preferences.label: brew cleanup
preferences.description: Remove old versions and cache files (older than 7 days)

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
